items.title: BMS and Oxford BioTherapeutics join forces in TCE discovery pact
items.summary: OBT's pact with BMS meshes with the former's hybrid partnership-pipeline strategy, which prioritises collaboration to maximise its impact.

items.title: Emerging therapies bring hope for frail HNSCC patients unfit for standard treatment
items.summary: Standard of care HNSCC regimens with curative intent demand surgery, radiation, and chemotherapy - treatments that many patients cannot tolerate.

items.title: Advancing single-cell transcriptomics into the mainstream of biomedical research
items.summary: Kelly Parliament, staff application scientist at Beckman Coulter Life Sciences, discusses how automation is improving the efficiency of single-cell transcriptomic workflows.

items.title: Roche and C4 Therapeutics to advance degrader-antibody conjugates research
items.summary: Roche has signed a new collaboration deal with C4 Therapeutics to jointly advance DACs research to introduce a new therapeutic modality for cancer.

items.title: Precision Medicine in Early Oncology Trials: Biomarkers as Strategic Drivers
items.summary: Biomarkers are revolutionizing oncology drug development, driving modern precision medicine approaches, targeted clinical trial recruitment strategies, and critical decision-making.
